data.title: Kinetiko Energy Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Kinetiko Energy Ltd. ( (AU:KKO) ) has issued an announcement.

Kinetiko Energy Ltd. has announced a change in the director’s interest, with Robert Anthony Scharnell Jnr acquiring 76,865 ordinary fully paid shares through an on-market trade, raising his total holdings to 361,865 shares. This increase in shareholding by a director may signal confidence in the company’s prospects, potentially influencing market perception and investor sentiment positively.

More about Kinetiko Energy Ltd.

Kinetiko Energy Ltd. is involved in the energy sector, focusing primarily on exploration and development activities related to unconventional gas resources. The company aims to harness significant gas reserves to cater to the growing energy demands.

YTD Price Performance: 4.29%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Freelancer Limited Addresses Late Lodgement Compliance Incident
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from Freelancer Ltd. ( (AU:FLN) ).

Freelancer Limited has addressed a late lodgement issue of Appendix 3Y with the ASX, attributed to an administrative oversight during the holiday season. The company assures that their current compliance practices are adequate and views the incident as isolated, affirming that directors are well-aware of their disclosure obligations.

More about Freelancer Ltd.

Freelancer Limited operates in the online freelancing and crowdsourcing industry, offering a platform where businesses and independent professionals connect for various projects and services. The company focuses on facilitating remote work opportunities across different sectors, catering to a global market.

data.title: Standard Chartered Continues Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has issued an update.

Standard Chartered PLC announced the purchase of 529,154 of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buy-back program. The shares were bought at prices ranging from 1,000.50 to 1,017.00 GB pence, with a volume-weighted average price of 1,010.47 GB pence. This move aligns with the company’s strategy to manage its capital and share capital structure effectively. Following the cancellation of these shares, the total number of ordinary shares in issue will be 2,422,304,903, maintaining the same number of voting rights. The share buy-back program signifies Standard Chartered’s efforts to enhance shareholder value and optimize its financial resources.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a leading banking and financial services company, incorporated as a public limited company in England and Wales. It primarily operates in the banking industry, offering a range of services including personal banking, corporate banking, and wealth management. The company is known for its significant presence in international markets, particularly in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.

YTD Price Performance: 1.95%

Average Trading Volume: 6,141

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $30.15B

Karoon Energy Ltd ( (AU:KAR) ) has issued an announcement.

Karoon Energy Ltd announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Dr. Julian Fowles. The company reported that Dr. Fowles exercised 121,594 unlisted performance rights, converting them into an equivalent number of ordinary fully paid shares. data.title: Therma Bright Announces Debt Settlement Through Shares Issuance
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Therma Bright ( (TSE:THRM) ) has provided an update.

Therma Bright Inc. has announced a debt settlement agreement with a third-party creditor, intending to settle $100,000 in debt through the issuance of 2,000,000 common shares at a price of $0.05 each, pending TSXV approval. This strategic move aims to strengthen Therma Bright’s financial standing, potentially enhancing their market positioning and ensuring greater operational flexibility.

More about Therma Bright

Therma Bright Inc. is a developer and investment partner specializing in advanced diagnostic and medical device technologies. Their focus is on providing innovative solutions to address significant medical and healthcare challenges, catering to both consumers and medical professionals.

data.description:

Tolu Minerals Limited ( (AU:TOK) ) has shared an update.

Trans Wonderland Limited has increased its relevant interest in Tolu Minerals Limited, a company involved in mineral exploration, by purchasing additional shares. As a result of this acquisition, Trans Wonderland’s voting power in Tolu Minerals has slightly decreased despite the increase in shares, now holding 13,686,123 fully paid ordinary shares, equating to an 8.20% voting power. This change in shareholding reflects Trans Wonderland’s strategic move to strengthen its influence within Tolu Minerals.
